name: IOT-Fire-Alarm
displayDescription: Full-stack IoT fire alarm system with real-time monitoring. Needed for affordable fire detection in homes, labs, or small buildings. Works by reading sensor data from Arduino, sending it to a Node.js/Express backend API, and displaying real-time graphs on a React dashboard with Chart.js. Contains 3 parts: Arduino sensor firmware (C++), Express backend API, and React + MUI frontend. Dockerized with Docker Compose.
